## Summary
Eternal inflation posits that inflationary expansion continues indefinitely in most of space, with localized regions forming pocket universes with potentially different physical constants.

## Evidence
Stochastic inflation calculations show the volume of inflating space grows exponentially faster than regions that thermalize.

## Significance
If correct, eternal inflation fundamentally changes cosmological predictions from unique values to statistical distributions over a landscape of vacua.
